# SL-ROBOTS-002: robots-syntax-error

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

robots.txt contains syntax that cannot be parsed.

## Metadata

- Category: robots.txt and sitemap (robots-sitemap)
- Default severity: error
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: site
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- robots-txt

## Required Evidence

- robots-line
- parse-error

## When This Triggers

Parse robots.txt and collect syntax errors.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Fix robots.txt syntax.

- Fix robots.txt syntax.
